label: Sacrificial Escalation
description: The collective becomes sacred, enemies become existential, and suffering, killing, or dying become morally required.

label: Restrained Reordering
description: The order reforms through pluralism, dissent, constitutional limits, anti-sacrificial memory, and distributed authority.

label: Collapse
description: The order loses legitimacy, coherence, or command capacity.

label: Absorption / Transformation
description: The old order survives partially by being incorporated into a successor order.

label: Stagnation / Frozen Pathology
description: The system persists through repression, ritualized ideology, inertia, or fear.

label: Hybrid / Transitional
description: Multiple outcomes occur in sequence or tension.
